name: Saed Yousef
title: Software Engineer | Backend Specialist | Development Team Lead
subtitle: I build stable backend systems and technical foundations.
about: As a Development Team Lead with 9+ years of experience, I specialize in backend systems, software architecture, RESTful APIs, third-party integrations, and technical decisions that keep products maintainable as they grow.

My main focus is performance, stability, clean service boundaries, and pragmatic delivery. I work primarily with PHP and Laravel, and I also use TypeScript, Nuxt, Go, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, databases, queues, and automation when they fit the problem.

I care about useful UI and frontend quality, but UI design is not my strongest skill. I am strongest when designing backend architecture, improving system reliability, making technical tradeoffs, and helping teams ship stable software.
